creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 193269
py-django-bootstrap-form-3.4.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch from svn that updates www/py-django-bootstrap-form to 3.4.

Changes by upstream:
- https://github.com/tzangms/django-bootstrap-form/compare/15187b95e7d12fa9b15107d2786458a573571a39...ce292cb4f7bcf763796c3bdebc51de07849bc319 
- Note: Repository has no real versioning scheme

Changes to the port:
- changed RUN_DEPENDS to Django v1.11
- added NO_ARCH
- updated WWW

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) for each py27 and py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK
